detail.description: Cam Cauley pops out to second baseman Jose Altuve.
Cam Cauley singles on a line drive to left fielder Taylor Trammell.
Cam Cauley singles on a ground ball to shortstop Zach Neto.
Cam Cauley pops out to second baseman Oswald Peraza.
Cam Cauley flies out to right fielder Matt Vierling.
Cam Cauley grounds out, third baseman Kevin McGonigle to first baseman Spencer Torkelson.
Cam Cauley lines out sharply to left fielder Riley Greene.
Cam Cauley singles on a ground ball to right fielder Kerry Carpenter.
Cam Cauley grounds out, shortstop Zach McKinstry to first baseman Spencer Torkelson.
Cam Cauley grounds into a double play, second baseman Daniel Schneemann to first baseman Rhys Hoskins. Kyle Higashioka out at 2nd. Cam Cauley out at 1st.
Cam Cauley grounds out, third baseman Gabriel Arias to first baseman Kyle Manzardo.
Cam Cauley grounds out, third baseman Gabriel Arias to first baseman Kyle Manzardo.
Cam Cauley pops out to second baseman Travis Bazzana.
Cam Cauley triples (1) on a line drive to right fielder Kahlil Watson.
Cam Cauley grounds out, shortstop Brayan Rocchio to first baseman Rhys Hoskins.
Cam Cauley pops out to first baseman Rhys Hoskins in foul territory.
Cam Cauley doubles (1) on a fly ball to second baseman Jorge Mateo, deflected by right fielder Brewer Hicklen.
Cam Cauley flies out to center fielder Michael Harris II.
